browserSidebar.loadError.checkProxyFirew: Hubinta habaynta proxy-ga, firewall-ka, iyo DNS-ka
browserSidebar.loadError.dnsBody: La xiriir maamulaha shabakaddaada haddii aadan hubin waxa tani ka dhigan tahay
browserSidebar.loadError.dnsSummary: Cinwaanka IP-ga ee server-ka {host} lama helin
browserSidebar.loadError.heading: Boggan lama gaadhi karo
browserSidebar.loadError.internetBody: Hubi fiilooyinka oo dib u bilow router-ka, modem-ka, ama qalab kasta oo shabakad ah oo aad isticmaalayso
browserSidebar.loadError.networkAccessBo: Haddii Codex hore ugu jiro liiska abka la oggol yahay, isku day inaad ka saarto liiska oo mar kale ku darto.
browserSidebar.loadError.networkAccessHe: U oggolow Codex inuu shabakadda ka galo dejimahaaga firewall-ka ama amniga
browserSidebar.loadError.offlineSummary: {host} lama furi karin sababtoo ah kombiyuutarku khadka kama jiro
browserSidebar.loadError.proxyBody: Fur dejimaha shabakadda ee nidaamkaaga oo hubi in proxy loo habeeyey shabakadda firfircoon
browserSidebar.loadError.timeoutSummary: {host} waxay qaadatay waqti aad u dheer inay ka jawaabto
desktop.intelLaunchWarning.detail: Dhismahan wuxuu ku shaqeeyaa Rosetta, balse dhismaha Apple Silicon si ka dhakhso badan ayuu u furmaa oo waxa uu u shaqeeyaa si fiican. Hadda ka bax si aad ugu shubto dhiskan Apple Silicon, ama sii wad dhiska Intel
desktop.intelLaunchWarning.message: {appName} waxa uu ku shaqaynayaa nooca Intel ee Mac Apple Silicon
